notes.mechanism_design: High-workload jobs within each service type are assigned to VC1 with ratio=0.70, creating intra-chain congestion while keeping VC2 non-empty. Each value-chain/type cell has two same-type SRUs, so cross-off retains two intra-chain choices and cross-on adds two cross-chain relief SRUs.
notes.value_chain_load_ratio_policy: la31-la35 and sm03_1: top 70% workload jobs per type -> VC1.
notes.processing_time_consistency_rule: For every job, operation, and base_machine_id, adjusted_processing_time is identical across all candidate SRUs.
notes.processing_cost_consistency_rule: For every job, operation, and base_machine_id, unit_processing_cost is identical across all candidate SRUs.
notes.machine_cost_rule: Machine cost is inverse-normalized from source mean processing time to [5.0, 12.0], rounded to 2 decimals.
